message:
chore: update all workspace dependencies to latest stable versions

cargo update across the entire workspace. Key updates include:
- zerocopy 0.8.39→0.8.48, serde 1.x patch, web-sys 0.3.85→0.3.94
- wayland-* ecosystem updates, wasm-encoder/wasmparser patches
- Various minor/patch updates across ~200 transitive dependencies

Verified:
- frankenterm-core: 21,302 tests pass (--no-default-features --lib)
- mux: 306 tests pass
- frankenterm binary: compiles clean

Closes wa-1ms1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
